---
title: "HPLC file conversion"
author: "Andrew Tolonen"
format: html
editor: visual
toc: TRUE
code-fold: TRUE
embed-resources: TRUE
---

# Introduction

The goal of this script is to convert .lcd files from the Shimadzu HPLC to text files that can be used for analysis.

```{r import LCD files}

library(chromConverter);
path = 
dat <- read_chroms(path, format_in = "chemstation_uv")

```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
